title: sections-checklist
description: Build state tracker for a niwashi narrative. Created during BUILD initialization, updated per section, and read by REVIEW and HARVEST phases.

project_path.description: Relative path from niwashi-studio root to the React project directory (e.g. './gradient-descent').

created.description: ISO 8601 date when the checklist was created.

review_approved.description: Set to true by the REVIEW phase after human approval. BUILD never sets this.

id.description: 1-based section index matching the narrative-spec order.

title.description: Section title from the narrative-spec (e.g. 'Hero — What is this about?').

wireframe_approved.description: Whether the wireframe for this section was approved in the WIREFRAME phase.

passes.description: Set to true after the section passes all verification checks and is approved (or auto-approved).

calibration_required.description: true for sections 1–2 (human approval needed), false for sections 3+ (autonomous).

verified_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last successful verification. null until verified.

commit.description: Short git SHA of the commit that captured this section. null until committed.
